text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask about her goals, Tosen Jordan
vaguely answers that she wants to "make it big."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But just before her debut race, her usual
laid-back demeanor suddenly changes. She tenses
up, wondering if she might not be good enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figure she might feel more comfortable talking
to her friends, so I leave it to Mejiro Palmer to
offer her support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's fears slowly melt away. When I see
her again, she looks full of determination.
